data.name: title2
data.value: Apartments in Toruń – comfortable accommodation

data.name: title2subtitle
data.value: Are you looking for a comfortable apartment in Toruń?

data.name: title3
data.value: Apartments in Toruń – comfortable accommodation

data.name: title3subtitle
data.value: Are you looking for a comfortable apartment in Toruń?

data.name: text1title2
data.value: Why are our apartments in Toruń unique?

data.name: text1title
data.value: We are glad you found us!

data.name: text1description2
data.value: Because we live in Toruń and we love this city. Because our team consists of people who travel alone and with children, for business and pleasure, for rest and for sightseeing. Because we truly know what you need and we want you to feel at home with us. It is important to us that you not only visit Toruń but also rest, relax, and take the best memories back with you.

data.name: text1description
data.value: We love Toruń and want to show you why. We will help you get to know our city and ensure you take home only good impressions. We know that sightseeing, even the most enjoyable kind, can be tiring. That is why it is important to us that at the end of the day you rest in exactly the conditions you expect. We have prepared our offer of apartments in Toruń specifically for you. Among dozens of accommodations and apartments, you will surely find one that suits your needs.

data.name: clientsstat
data.value: Satisfied customers

data.name: apartmentsstats
data.value: Apartments in Toruń

data.name: locationsstats
data.value: Locations in Toruń

data.name: whyRentoom
data.value: Why Rentoom?

data.name: whyRentoomText1
data.value: To make your stay as easy as possible, we have implemented a modern lock system in our apartments. Thanks to this, you can check in and out independently at any time. You do not need to pick up or return keys. Each apartment we offer is characterized by a unique style and attention to detail in its finishes.

data.name: whyRentoomText2
data.value: In all our apartments, you will find free WiFi, a TV with a Netflix account, and a fully equipped kitchen. Our offer also includes apartments perfect for a romantic weekend for two, as well as for a longer stay in Toruń for a truly large family. Our apartments are located exactly how you like them. Choose the one that suits you best. We have apartments in Toruń's Old Town as well as on the outskirts of the city. With a view of the market square or the Vistula River. You will surely find the apartment in Toruń that you are looking for.

data.name: whyRentoomTitle
data.value: Advantages of our apartments in Toruń.

data.name: opinionText
data.value: Read reviews from people who have stayed in our apartments in Toruń.

data.name: formtext
data.value: Leave your contact information, and we will get in touch with you!

data.name: formContactText
data.value: Contact form

data.name: formConfirm
data.value: I consent to the processing of my personal data provided in the form above.

data.value: What distinguishes our apartments from others?
